golden.answer_preview: Exit load is a fee charged when an investor withdraws their investment from a mutual fund. For HDFC Banking & Financial Services Fund Direct Growth, the exit load is 1%, if redeemed within 30 days. It is charged to discourage investors from withdrawing their funds prematurely.

HDFC Nifty Midcap 150 Index Fund Direct Growth tracks the NIFTY Midcap 150 Total Return Index.

This is stated under "Fund Benchmark" in the source information.

The expense ratio is a measure of the annual maintenance charge levied by mutual funds to finance their expenses, including management fees, allocation charges, and advertising costs. 
For HDFC Defence Fund Direct Growth, the expense ratio is 0.83%.
